# Autopsia Digital / Product Autopsy AI

Autopsia Digital / Product Autopsy AI is a bilingual strategic diagnosis service for digital products that are not selling, converting or getting users.

## Main URLs

- Spanish homepage: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/
- English homepage: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/
- Use cases: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/use-cases.html
- Methodology: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/methodology.html
- Market study: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/market-study.html
- Deliverable: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/deliverable.html
- Order: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/order.html
- FAQ: https://aambroj.github.io/Autopsia_Digital/en/faq.html

## Service summary

Product Autopsy AI analyzes apps, websites, landing pages, SaaS products, online courses, ebooks, newsletters, internal tools, prototypes and digital ideas.

The goal is to find out why a digital product is not selling, converting or getting traction, and provide a clear decision:

- Relaunch.
- Reposition.
- Pause.
- Shut down.

## Plans

- Express Autopsy: $49 / 49 €
- Full Autopsy: $149 / 149 €
- Premium Autopsy + Strategic Market Study: $399 / 399 €

## Methodology

The Product Autopsy Score evaluates 8 areas:

- Clarity.
- Target customer.
- Real pain.
- Differentiation.
- Trust.
- Offer.
- Conversion.
- Viability.

Maximum score: 40 points.
